name: Chocolate Zucchini Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Melted Chocolate, Chocolate Chips, 2 cups Grated Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chocolate with egg mixture along with zucchini and vanilla.
2. Sift flour, salt, cinnamon, baking powder, and baking soda into the zucchini mixture.
3. Stir in nuts and chips thoroughly using a large spoon.
4. Spoon batter into 2 well-greased 9-inch x 5-inch pans.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
MY NOTE: Excellent Quickbread. Very Moist and sweet.
This recipe comes from Country Cook'n, compiled by the St Rose Parishioners of Fredonia, Wis and St Mary's Parishioners of Little Kohler, Wis. The original recipe is attributed to Mary Niedermeyer.
